text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 115 

GAP_INP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the 
coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
